mentions.note: Revenue +17%, guidance good; no controversy despite iPhone questions; own it don't trade it; camera excellence (17 Pro Max) shows manufacturing mastery; should have popped more post-earnings.

17% revenue growth, 75% EPS growth, AWS +28% (best in 4 years), custom chip business at $20B run rate, operating income +30%; guidance mixed on operating income; parabolic move consolidating, CEO Jassy best explainer of data center ROI; stock should go higher but move overstretched.
Networking play; part of big three with Ciena and Cisco; strong positioning in data center buildout.
Competitor position benefiting from data center buildout; stock going parabolic—Cramer doesn't buy parabolas; position being built ahead of May 6 earnings but stock has gotten away.
Satellite constellation play; speculative but lots to recommend; Cramer likes space opportunity despite risk; acceptable speculative holding.
Company imploded despite good story repeatedly told on show; Cramer owns in trust; needs further investigation.
Company Cramer repeatedly championed on Mad Money with terrific story; imploded in earnings despite being in trust; ouch surprise; needs further investigation after loss.
Air conditioning and climate control; data centers burn real hot; big upside surprise suggests multiyear move beginning; also strong European numbers.

Unexpected winner: investors buying hundreds of Cat engines for private off-grid power plants to power data centers with West Virginia natural gas; inventory fears flip to shortage risk; huge new business driver.
Networking equipment connecting chips in data centers; essential infrastructure play alongside Arista and Cisco; stock been strong for ages, gaining 11% on data center tailwind.
Networking equipment, up 11%; essential for chip-to-chip communication in data centers; industry stalwart alongside Arista and Cisco.
Networking infrastructure; long-time industry leader benefiting from data center buildout alongside Arista and Ciena.
Makes transformers connecting grid to data centers; benefits from utilities' need to double capacity; steady industrial play on infrastructure boom.

22% revenue growth, 82% EPS growth, Google Cloud +63% to $20B, custom TPU demand strong, Gemini Enterprise paid users +40% QoQ, raising CapEx by $5B to $180–190B with more expected in 2027; coining money, clear line of sight to profitability.
Pivoted from paper shredding to data center colocation; leasing massive document storage facilities next to hyperscalers for AI chip racks; cashing in on infrastructure buildout.
Da Vinci surgical robot had great quarter but facing competitive threats from J&J and Medtronic; worry one competitor will land disruptive offering and cannibalize market dominance.
Tiny farmland REIT with no growth appeal; Cramer wants growth, not farmland yield plays; lacks the dynamic characteristics of data center infrastructure.

GLP-1 pill Zounandea exceeding expectations with 20K+ users and strong demand despite late start; astounded market with fantastic quarter; strong for economy but healthcare not good stock market indicator.

Down 4% despite beat on top/bottom line due to modest expense guidance miss; 3.7B people on network, most tech-forward system; leading agented AI commerce via Verifiable Intent protocol; stablecoin opportunity unlocking new payment flows; stock too low, oversold.

33% revenue growth (best in 5 years), 62% EPS growth, but family DAP shrank vs prior quarter, CapEx raised $10B to $125–145B for component inflation; lacks cloud infrastructure monetization path like peers; investors unconvinced on AI spending justification; stock down 8%.

18% revenue growth, 23% EPS growth, Azure +40% strong, but overall revenue guidance light, Copilot users 20M underwhelming, and $40B+ quarterly CapEx with 190B full-year forecast spooked market; weak narrative on how spending converts to returns; stock down 4%.
Largest U.S. steel company; benefits from Quanta and other infrastructure buildout for data center grid expansion.
Too speculative and wild a trader; caller down 10% but should not add; speculative nuclear play too volatile for regular portfolio building.
Caller concerned stock up then down with little net movement; Cramer sees as long-term holding; firing on all cylinders fundamentally but stock acts done—sentiment not justified by execution.
Infrastructure installer powering grid buildout for data centers; management cites utilities doubling in size to meet AI demand; obvious winner in multi-year cycle.
Landed big hyperscaler account, rebranding from cell phone play to data center supplier; shifting narrative as positive.

Database of human conversations essential for AI training; 7 consecutive quarters 60%+ growth, 90% gross margins, $1M CapEx (not building data centers), ad revenue +74%, unique audience (30% not on other socials); early innings of monetization; addresses loneliness epidemic.
Memory/storage play; parabolic like WDC and Seagate; Cramer recommends selling overextended positions.
Memory/storage supplier gaining from data center buildout but stock massively parabolic; sell on strength—too extended for entry.
Storage supplier reported terrific quarter but stock parabolic; Cramer favors exiting on overextension.
Storage supplier mentioned across mega-cap earnings for component cost inflation; terrific quarter but stock overextended and parabolic—sell on strength.
Semiconductor test and measurement; high-volume chip production for data centers requires extensive testing; more arcane but essential play.
Semiconductor test and measurement, up 12%; critical for data center chip validation as volume ramps.
Cooling/power infrastructure; data center build beneficiary alongside Eaton and Quanta.
Component cost inflation bullish near-term but stock parabolic; Cramer says sell, sell, sell on overextension.
Storage play benefiting from data center component demand but stock way too far parabolic; sell—overextended on valuation.
